tools.name: ctx_pip_list
tools.description: List all installed Python packages in column format.

tools.name: ctx_pip_outdated
tools.description: List outdated Python packages with current and latest versions.

tools.name: ctx_pip_audit
tools.description: Audit Python packages for known security vulnerabilities.
tools.command: pip-audit 2>/dev/null || safety check 2>/dev/null || echo 'Neither pip-audit nor safety is installed. Install with: pip install pip-audit'
